name: Negative Scenario - Create track directly without providing track info, Navigate to Module section directly
fullName: CREATE TRACKS: Negative Scenario - Create track directly without providing track info, Navigate to Module section directly

steps.name: And user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
Given user navigates to "tracks" section of create
When user clicks on "create" button in track info
Then user verifies track cannot be created without filling mandatory fields
